moments.title: Glastonbury Festival wraps up
moments.blurb: The iconic Glastonbury Festival concludes today, June 27th, after five days of music, arts, and culture at Worthy Farm.

angles.name: Festival Afterglow
angles.copy: Glastonbury 2026 is officially wrapped! What was your highlight from Worthy Farm this year?

angles.name: Headliner Recap
angles.copy: From legends to breakout stars, Glastonbury delivered! Who owned the Pyramid Stage for you?

angles.name: Mud & Memories
angles.copy: Another year, another incredible Glastonbury. Time to hose off the wellies and cherish the memories!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 kicks off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins on Monday, June 29th, at the All England Club in London.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 starts Monday. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Our British hopefuls are gearing up for Wimbledon starting Monday. Can anyone go all the way this year?

angles.name: Tradition & Excitement
angles.copy: The grass courts of Wimbledon await! Get ready for two weeks of thrilling tennis, starting June 29th.

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Qualifying
moments.blurb: Final qualifying events for The 154th Open Championship, taking place at Royal Birkdale in July, are set to be played on June 30th.

angles.name: Pathway to Glory
angles.copy: Who will make it through Final Qualifying for The Open Championship this Tuesday? Dreams are on the line!

angles.name: Golf's Ultimate Test
angles.copy: The road to Royal Birkdale continues! Golfers battle it out in Final Qualifying for The Open Championship on June 30th.

moments.title: Wireless Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival, one of the UK's biggest urban music festivals, takes place from July 3rd to 5th.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Get ready for three days of huge tunes! Wireless Festival kicks off next Friday, July 3rd.

angles.name: Urban Music Mecca
angles.copy: Wireless is just around the corner! Who are you most excited to see hit the stage from July 3-5?

moments.title: Tour de France 2026 Grand Départ
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France begins with its Grand Départ in Barcelona, Spain, on Saturday, July 4th.

angles.name: Cycling Spectacle
angles.copy: The greatest show on two wheels is back! The Tour de France Grand Départ is next Saturday, July 4th.

angles.name: Who will wear Yellow?
angles.copy: The race for the Maillot Jaune begins July 4th! Get ready for three weeks of epic cycling in the Tour de France.

moments.title: Love Island UK still heating up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK continues to deliver daily drama and romance as the islanders navigate their relationships in the villa.

angles.name: Daily Dose of Drama
angles.copy: Another day, another dose of Love Island drama! What's got you talking from the villa?

angles.name: Couple Goals or Chaos?
angles.copy: Are your favourite Love Island couples still going strong, or is chaos brewing? Tune in tonight!

moments.title: Official Singles Chart update
moments.blurb: The UK's Official Singles Chart is updated today, revealing the latest top tracks and potentially a new Number 1.

angles.name: New Number 1?
angles.copy: Has a new track stormed to the top? The Official Singles Chart is out today! Who's your pick for Number 1?

angles.name: Chart Rundown
angles.copy: Catch up on the latest UK Official Singles Chart! What's climbing, what's falling, and what's brand new in the Top 40?

moments.title: Happy 29th to H.E.R.
moments.blurb: Grammy and Oscar-winning R&B singer-songwriter H.E.R. (Gabriella Wilson) celebrates her 29th birthday today, June 27th.

angles.name: R&B Star
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the incredibly talented H.E.R., who turns 29 today! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Soulful Sounds
angles.copy: Happy 29th Birthday to the queen of soulful R&B, H.E.R.! Hope she's having an amazing day.

moments.title: Christian Kane turns 52
moments.blurb: Actor and country-rock musician Christian Kane, known for 'Leverage' and his music career, celebrates his 52nd birthday today, June 27th.

angles.name: Rocking 52
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the multi-talented Christian Kane! What's your favourite song or role?

angles.name: Actor & Musician
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 52nd Birthday to Christian Kane today! Hope it's a great one.

moments.title: Mark Stoermer is 48
moments.blurb: Mark Stoermer, bassist for The Killers, celebrates his 48th birthday tomorrow, June 28th.

angles.name: Killer Bassist
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very Happy 48th Birthday to Mark Stoermer of The Killers! What's your favourite Killers track?

angles.name: 00s Icon
angles.copy: Happy early 48th Birthday to Mark Stoermer! Celebrating the man behind the basslines of some of the 00s biggest hits.

moments.title: Kellie Pickler turns 40
moments.blurb: American country music singer and TV personality Kellie Pickler celebrates her 40th birthday tomorrow, June 28th.

angles.name: Country Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 40th Birthday to the wonderful Kellie Pickler tomorrow! Hope she has a fantastic day.

angles.name: American Idol Alum
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to American Idol alum and country star Kellie Pickler on June 28th!

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger is 48
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, best known as the lead singer of The Pussycat Dolls, turns 48 on June 29th.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to the phenomenal Nicole Scherzinger on Monday! What's your favourite Pussycat Dolls hit?

angles.name: Pop & Dance Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Nicole Scherzinger's 48th Birthday this Monday! Still bringing the moves and the vocals.

moments.title: Fantasia Barrino turns 42
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B singer and American Idol winner Fantasia Barrino celebrates her 42nd birthday on June 30th.

angles.name: R&B Powerhouse
angles.copy: Happy 42nd Birthday to the incredible Fantasia Barrino on Tuesday! Her voice is pure magic.

angles.name: Idol Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating American Idol winner Fantasia Barrino's 42nd Birthday this June 30th! What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Missy Elliott is 55
moments.blurb: The legendary rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: Hip Hop Icon
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott on July 1st! A true pioneer.

angles.name: Visionary
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Missy Elliott turning 55 this Wednesday! Her impact on music and videos is unmatched.

moments.title: Debbie Harry turns 81
moments.blurb: Deborah Harry, the iconic lead singer of new wave band Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st.

angles.name: New Wave Legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry! Still looking and sounding incredible. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Iconic Frontwoman
angles.copy: One Way Or Another, we're celebrating Debbie Harry's 81st Birthday this Wednesday! An undisputed rock icon.

moments.title: Ashley Tisdale is 41
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Ashley Tisdale, known for 'High School Musical' and her pop career, celebrates her 41st birthday on July 2nd.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the fabulous Ashley Tisdale on Thursday! From East High to pop stardom.

angles.name: 00s Throwback
angles.copy: Celebrating Ashley Tisdale's 41st Birthday this July 2nd! What's your favourite HSM song she was in?

moments.title: Vince Clarke turns 66
moments.blurb: Vince Clarke, the pioneering synth-pop musician from Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on July 3rd.

angles.name: Synth-Pop Master
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the legendary Vince Clarke! A true architect of electronic music from Depeche Mode, Yazoo & Erasure.

angles.name: Electronic Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating Vince Clarke's 66th Birthday this Friday! His influence on synth-pop and dance is immeasurable.

moments.title: Post Malone is 31
moments.blurb: Multi-genre artist Post Malone, known for hits like 'Rockstar' and 'Sunflower', celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Pop & Hip Hop Star
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone this Saturday! Hope he's having a 'Goodbyes' free day!

angles.name: Genre-Bending Artist
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st Birthday on July 4th! What's your favourite track from his diverse discography?

moments.title: RZA turns 57
moments.blurb: Robert Fitzgerald Diggs, better known as RZA, the leader of the Wu-Tang Clan, celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5th.

angles.name: Wu-Tang Leader
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the Abbot himself, RZA of the legendary Wu-Tang Clan, this Sunday!

angles.name: Hip Hop Architect
angles.copy: Celebrating RZA's 57th Birthday on July 5th! A true mastermind behind some of hip hop's most iconic sounds.

moments.title: 50 Cent is 51
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, actor, and businessman 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6th.

angles.name: Rap Mogul
angles.copy: Go Shorty, It's Ya Birthday! Happy 51st Birthday to 50 Cent this Monday! Hope it's a big one.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only 50 Cent's 51st Birthday on July 6th! Still getting rich or dying trying.

moments.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
moments.blurb: The legendary drummer for The Beatles, Ringo Starr (Richard Starkey), celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Happy 86th Birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr next Tuesday! What's your favourite Ringo moment?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring legend, Ringo Starr, who turns 86 on July 7th! Still got that rhythm.
